name: radial-chart
description: Unified radial chart component supporting all variations: grid, label, text, shape, and stacked configurations

data.name: data
data.description: Array of data items for the radial chart. Each item should have 'label' (string) and 'value' (number). Example: [{label: 'Mon', value: 60}, {label: 'Tue', value: 80}]

stackedData.name: stackedData
stackedData.description: Array of stacked series data. When provided, takes precedence over data. Example: [{name: 'Desktop', value: 40}, {name: 'Mobile', value: 30}]

ringWidth.name: ringWidth
ringWidth.description: Inner and outer width of the ring [start, end]. Default: [30, 140]

ringGap.name: ringGap
ringGap.description: Gap between rings as percentage string. Default: '10%'

showGrid.name: showGrid
showGrid.description: Whether to show grid lines. Default: true

showAngleAxis.name: showAngleAxis
showAngleAxis.description: Whether to show angle axis (circular axis). Default: false

showRadiusAxisLabels.name: showRadiusAxisLabels
showRadiusAxisLabels.description: Whether to show radius axis labels. Default: false

centerText.name: centerText
centerText.description: Main text to display in the center. Example: '85%'

centerSubtext.name: centerSubtext
centerSubtext.description: Subtitle text below the main center text. Example: 'Average'

centerTextFontSize.name: centerTextFontSize
centerTextFontSize.description: Font size for the center main text. Default: 24

centerSubtextFontSize.name: centerSubtextFontSize
centerSubtextFontSize.description: Font size for the center subtitle. Default: 14

angleAxisMax.name: angleAxisMax
angleAxisMax.description: Maximum value for the angle axis. Default: 100

clockwise.name: clockwise
clockwise.description: Whether to render clockwise. Default: false

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels. Example: 220

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Example: 450

theme.name: theme
theme.description: Partial theme override for customizing chart appearance. Example: {series: [{color: '#3b82f6'}]}

colors.name: colors
colors.description: Colors for the chart series. Overrides theme colors. Example: ['#3b82f6', '#10b981', '#f59e0b']
